mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, leave_type, start_time, end_time, days, reason, status, created_at, updated_at FROM leave_record WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND status != ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(l.days), 0) FROM leave_record l INNER JOIN employee e ON l.employee_id = e.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(l.start_time, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND e.status = AND l.status !=
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_record (employee_id, leave_type, start_time, end_time, reason, status) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{leaveType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reason}, COALESCE(#{status}, ))
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_record SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, leave_type = #{leaveType}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, reason = #{reason}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
